name: db_interface
description: Production-safe multi-source SQL and procedure workbench for Fabric and SQL Server

scripts.verify: npm run clean && npm run build && node scripts/sql-classifier.test.mjs && node scripts/sql-metadata.test.mjs && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/ui-smoke.mjs && npm run responsive:audit
scripts.verify:release: npm run clean && npm run build && node scripts/sql-classifier.test.mjs && node scripts/sql-metadata.test.mjs && node scripts/server-unit.test.mjs && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/route-contract.test.mjs && node scripts/ui-smoke.mjs && npm run responsive:audit && npm ls --depth=0 && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate && node scripts/release-diagnostics.mjs

author: Mohamed Almefrej
